twitch_info.title: Keep try, butterfly! | I wanna be the Butterfly.
twitch_info.description:
Go Live: [ Butterfly flies past the limit. ]
Second Title: [ NEW GAME!!| BattleBlock Theater. ]

message.body: lmao do you actually have a pixel limit

balloon do you know who howie is?

but the can't edit out the embarassment
I'm reminded of The Chase, and the time Bradley Walsh had to read out the following question, phrased exactly this way: "The giant cock in Trafalgar Square is what colour?"
(They were asking about a giant cockatiel statue.)
I swear the writers of that show's questions go out of their way to fuck with the host sometimes lmao
